---
title: Overview
description: A list of listings of posts.
aliases: 
  - "/index.html"
  
listing:
  - id: lst-general
    contents:
      - math/index.qmd
      - cp/index.qmd
      - technical/index.qmd
      - short/index.qmd
      - casual/index.qmd
      - solution/index.qmd
      - draft/index.qmd
      - all/index.qmd
    fields: ["title", "subtitle", "description", "image"]
    type: grid
    sort: false
  - id: lst-specialized
    contents:
      - commalg/index.qmd
      - nilpcone/index.qmd
      - group-rep-tour/index.qmd
    fields: ["title", "subtitle", "description", "image"]
    type: grid
    sort: false

page-layout: full
toc: false

format:
  html: default
---

## General

:::{#lst-general}
:::

## Specialized

:::{#lst-specialized}
:::
